title: AbortSeqOnFail Property
description: Allows the user to specify that if the specified object fails (i.e. is not passed), then the entire sequence is aborted at that point and no further objects are processed.
notes:
This feature is useful since in many cases subsequent objects are based on previous objects and if the early objects are not passed, there is no reason to even try to process the subsequent objects.

Vision Objects: AbortSeqOnFail Property

Blob	Line

Correlation	Edge

Point	Frame

Polar	Geometric

CodeReader	OCR

ColorMatch	LineFinder

ArcFinder	DefectFinder

ArcInspector	LineInspector
